infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vulcan uses the camera to scan VIN barcodes on door jamb stickers and to capture photos of parts and conditions as diagnostic evidence and for inspection reports.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Vulcan uses the microphone to transcribe spoken notes during a diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vulcan accesses photos to attach images as diagnostic evidence and to inspection reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Vulcan saves inspection report photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Vulcan connects to OBD2 scan tools over Bluetooth to read live vehicle data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Vulcan connects to OBD2 scan tools over Bluetooth to read live vehicle data.

plugins.cameraPermission: Vulcan uses the camera to scan VIN barcodes from the driver door jamb sticker.

plugins.photosPermission: Vulcan accesses photos to attach images as diagnostic evidence and to inspection reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Vulcan uses the camera to capture photos of parts and conditions as diagnostic evidence and for inspection reports.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Vulcan connects to OBD2 scan tools over Bluetooth to read live vehicle data.
